name: astarscan
description: Edge document scanner PWA — video-stream mass page extraction to PDF, fully offline, MIT licensed

scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:web
scripts.build:packages: bun run build:core && bun run build:vue && bun run build:element
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:core && bun run typecheck:vue && bun run typecheck:element && bun run typecheck:web
scripts.dev:web: bun run build:packages && bun run --cwd apps/web dev
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/core clean && bun run --cwd packages/vue clean && bun run --cwd packages/element clean && bun run --cwd apps/web clean
scripts.clean:deep: bun run clean && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules
scripts.ci: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun run test
